channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: One purple sack, 22nd March
item.description:
One purple sack of litter collected by a street friend

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Street Hill, Sundridge, Greater London

item.description:

item.title: Large bags dumped, 22nd March
item.description:
See image

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Clothes flytipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Clothes left in the alleyway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Cerise Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned B&Q trolley Halt Robin Road Belvedere DA17, 22nd March
item.description:
There has been an abandoned B&Q shopping trolley dumped on the grass verge of Halt Robin Road Belvedere DA17 for the last 2 weeks. Its approximately 10 metres from the junction with Upper Park Road. Requests to B&Q Belvedere to collect the trolley have been ignored! Would arrangements be put in place to remove the trolley as soon as practical.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halt Robin Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 Laxton Place NW1, 22nd March
item.description:
There is a sizeable pothole here next to side of St Mary Magdalene church and outside of council house on Layton Place. In the dark you cannot see it and could have a nasty fall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-18, Stanhope Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sink hole Alscot Way, 22nd March
item.description:
The pavement in front of Number 13 Alscot way is colapsing. You can see the pipes underneath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Rug dumped next to 8 Suffield Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Suffield Road, West Green, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped on grass, 22nd March
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left discarded by the side of the pavement near the entrance to trinity school sixth form, 22nd March
item.description:
Used nappies, used food, cartons and food wastage left by the side of the road. Imagine foxes got to it in the morning as it’s spread into the road causing an obstruction and cars can’t get past now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street is a proper state, 22nd March
item.description:
Please collect all the litter here
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of bulky rubbish, 22nd March
item.description:
Rough sleepers set a tent there with so much litter around! They constantly fight too, which makes the park not a safe space to enjoy the family time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allen Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and household rubbish on either side of Margaret Road., 22nd March
item.description:
This area is used for fly tipping every single day.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Margaret Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Douglas Road Junction of Willesden Lane, 22nd March
item.description:
Street parking sign knocked over

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flower box, 22nd March
item.description:
This flower box has been left dumped here for about a year. It is full of soil and has never had any flowers planted in it. Why hasn't the caretaker disposed of it as it is on the pathway and clearly doesn't belong there. It is now collecting other plants and is becoming more of an eyesore.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coltness Crescent, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 22nd March
item.description:
Someone hasn't cleaned up after their dog
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous iron work exposed, 22nd March
item.description:
Dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fortis Green Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping outside 9 Vicarage Park, 22nd March
item.description:
Dumped children's toys, luggage and house hold waste dumped Friday 20th March.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vicarage Park, Plumstead

item.title: Big pothole, 22nd March
item.description:
There is a big pothole and more emerging

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Argyle Road, Woodside Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement, 22nd March
item.description:
This furniture is growing by the day. It's now all along swallands road ie on the triangle. It's about time lewisham council done something about this . It's not going to get any better. To stop this it would be a detergent if cctv camera was put up so you the council could prosecute the culprits which in turn would pay for the camera's. I'm sorry to say Bellingham in in a sorry state and I fill sorry for the guys who have to clear is mess up every week .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallands Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
